name: Carrot Confetti Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Raw carrots, scrubbed and slivered
1 cup Red cabbage, trimmed and shredded
1 cup Raw zucchini, scrubbed and slivered
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss all vegetables in a large salad bowl with dressing.
2. Chill and serve.
Total calories per serving: 73 Fat: 2 grams
